title: Frau Luna

actors: Lizzi Waldmüller, Fita Benkhoff, Irene von Meyendorff
plot: Berlin, 1900. Comedian Lepke desperately tries to raise money for the bicycle he needs for his variety act while the operetta director Knoppe uses his influence in high places to get the chorus line's risky costumes accepted by th...
